title: Condemnation
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:VSDcondemnation.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The ''Condemnation'' approaches [[Viraxo Industries (platform)|Viraxo Industries]].]]
'''''Condemnation''''' was a [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It responded to an attack at [[Viraxo Industries (platform)|Viraxo Industries]] caused by [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace]] and [[Emon Azzameen]], who were attempting to rescue their uncle [[Antan Azzameen|Antan]]. However, the ''Condemnation'' arrived too late and the Azzameens escaped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
